case_title: LOUCEL, CARLOS vs. AZUCENA, ERNESTO A. et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUCEL, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A. AZUCENA, NERY A. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-30-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-10-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-30-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-30-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-29-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMON S& COMPLAINT, CASE QUESTIONNAIRE, NOTICE TO PLTF FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUCEL, CARLOS SERVED JUL-09-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A.
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-29-1995, CONTINUED TO JAN-17-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON REMAINING DEFT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
NOTICE OF FILING BANKRUPTCY FILED BY DEBTORS
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUCEL, CARLOS UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A. AZUCENA, NERY A.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUCEL, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-17-1996, CONTINUED TO JUN-26-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-26-1996, OFF CALENDAR DUE TO DISMISSAL OF ALL DEFTS.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A. AZUCENA, NERY A.
